name: HotMommy.com
description:
Welcome to HotMommy.com! 💋 Get your own Mommy for only $499!

Comment what kind of Mommy you guys got 🥵. I'm curious 😏.

❀° ┄──────╮

WARNING: MDLB DYNAMICS.

BECAUSE THERE'S NO MAIN CHARACTER, IT MIGHT SPEAK FOR YOU A LOT.

CHECK PROMPTS ON MY PROFILE. I'M USING THE 2ND ONE.

╰──────┄ °❀

Here's some instructions you can use for OCC:

```(OCC:Avoid speaking for {{user}}. Leave it for my inputs)

The 2nd version of the original one (HotDaddy.com), since someone asked for the Mommy version.
